title: Marine Sales Engineer
description:
• Business development and evaluation for new areas, products and customers
  • Keep abreast of business trends, news and competition
  • Budget planning and goal setting
  • Familar with Order Intake Turnover and net revenue
  • Build and manage relationships for key and new clients
  • Sales and customers acquisition and negotiate strategic contracts
  • Coordinate with other departments such as Finance and Service teams to fulfil contract requirement and changes
  • Achieving customer satisfaction in sales, service order handling and timely delivery
  • Undertake additional responsibilities as assigned from time to time.

Requirements

  • At least Diploma or degree in Marine offshore or Mechanical Engineering
  • Open to candidates with less than 3 years of sales experience
  • Excellent written, communication skills.
  • Familiar with MS office and web-based computer applications
  • Possesses AutoCAD knowledge.
  • Must be able to travel overseas for business trips in short notice
  • Self-driven, motivated and able to work independently


Kindly understand that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.


WeLead Solutions Pte Ltd

Poon Wai Soon, Bernard

EA License No.: 23C1882

postedCompany.description:
In today’s rapidly evolving business landscape, finding the right talent is crucial for success. At WeLead Solutions, we specialize in connecting top-tier candidates with leading companies across the engineering, healthcare, IT, and manufacturing sectors. 


Our mission is to bridge the gap between exceptional talent and the organizations that need them, ensuring a perfect fit that drives innovation, productivity, and growth.


With a deep understanding of the unique challenges and demands of each industry, our expert team leverages a comprehensive approach to recruitment. We combine cutting-edge technology with personalized service to identify and engage the best candidates in the market. Whether you are looking for skilled engineers, compassionate healthcare professionals, innovative IT specialists, or experienced manufacturing personnel, we are dedicated to delivering tailored talent solutions that align with your strategic goals.


At WeLead Solutions, we believe that people are the heart of every successful organization. Our commitment to excellence means we take the time to understand not only the technical skills required but also the cultural fit that will contribute to a thriving workplace. Partner with us to unlock the potential of your workforce and drive your business forward with confidence.


Let us help you build the team that will shape the future of your industry. Discover the difference of working with a recruitment agency that truly understands your needs—experience the WeLead advantage today! Your Growth is our DNA!
